html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Catcoon

The Kit Collar can be crafted and used on a Kitcoon to give it a name. Similar to the Beefalo Bell, left clicking on a Kitcoon while holding the Kit Collar will cause an interface to appear that allows the player to enter a name for the Kitcoon, or select a pre-generated name by clicking the "Random" button. Named Kitcoons will display their given name when hovering over them instead of the word "Kitcoon".

Gallery

  • The interface to type in a name for player's Kitcoon.

Miscellaneous
"kitcoon_nametag"
“I should think of some names! Let's see, Wilson Jr., Wilson Jr. 2...”
–Wilson
“I should test its fire resistance. Y'know, to make sure it's safe.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang will give tiny kitty good, strong name!”
–Wolfgang
“It's too painful to grow attached to things.”
–Wendy
“WHY BOTHER ASSIGNING A DESIGNATION TO A USELESS FLESH CREATURE”
–WX-78
“Ah, it does bring back memories of my dear old cat...”
–Wickerbottom
“Thought up any good names, Luce?”
–Woodie
“I've named so many creatures at this point, the novelty has worn off.”
–Maxwell
“To me, tiny beastie! I shall gift thee with a warrior's name!”
–Wigfrid
“We always wanted a pet!”
–Webber
“What shall I call you, mes petits chats?”
–Warly
“For furry friends to wear”
–Wormwood
“Name tags can be pretty handy in the workplace.”
–Winona
“To help identify who's theirs and who's mine.”
–Wortox
“Fish necklace for little kitties.”
–Wurt
“It looks almost like yours, Woby!”
–Walter
“This will make it easier to remember who's who at least.”
–Wanda
The Kit Collar can be crafted and used on a Kitcoon to give it a name. Similar to the Beefalo Bell, left clicking on a Kitcoon while holding the Kit Collar will cause an interface to appear that allows the player to enter a name for the Kitcoon, or select a pre-generated name by clicking the "Random" button. Named Kitcoons will display their given name when hovering over them instead of the word "Kitcoon".

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Vòng cổ Kitcoon có thể được chế tạo và sử dụng trên Kitcoon để đặt tên cho nó. Tương tự như Chuông Bò Lai, nhấp chuột trái vào Kitcoon trong khi giữ Vòng Cổ Kitcoon sẽ làm xuất hiện giao diện cho phép người chơi nhập tên cho Kitcoon hoặc chọn tên được tạo trước bằng cách nhấp vào nút "Ngẫu nhiên". Những chú Kitcoon được đặt tên sẽ hiển thị tên đã đặt của chúng khi di chuột qua chúng thay vì từ "Kitcoon".

The '''Kit Collar''' can be crafted and used on a [[Kitcoon]] to give it a name. Similar to the [[Beefalo Bell]], left clicking on a Kitcoon while holding the Kit Collar will cause an interface to appear that allows the player to enter a name for the Kitcoon, or select a pre-generated name by clicking the "Random" button. Named Kitcoons will display their given name when hovering over them instead of the word "Kitcoon".
